column1: hey Karolina its Spiffy on my work line!

to answer your question, your week is def one of the shoulder weeks for spring break. but there will still be college students there. for example i'm talking to a san diego state group right now for the same week
Ah ok as long as we are not going solo
Nahh you'll be good! theres other schools with the same week as you. our team will be there for you too to assist with whatever you need
hey hey, those two rooms we added to the reservation, are they still joining?
We definitely have one of the rooms joining. I'm going to text and ask my friends about the second
okay bet yea lmk. Ops team was asking whats up. the rom that is joining, are they able to hop in today?
Hey you can remove the 5th room. We r going to have two others filling the extra spots on the existing rooms but will not need the extra room
hey hey! are those two others filling the last two open slots on the res?
sup Karolina, any word on those two open slots? ops team is on my back about them lol
Hey I emailed you about one of them and the pricing at this time but you hadn't responded
Also am I able to get a contract about what is included in the pricing that we have all agreed to?
oh sorry I must've missed that
yea have you been able to log onto your account?

No worries. What is the pricing for anyone who joins at this point? Do you think you could get that contract to me about information with check in at the hotel/the booze cruise included in the pricing
yup so right now your account should list out everything that you have included in your package
Yes I just wanted it in like a formal contract so there is no risk of any additional charges/pricing changes when we arrive at the resort
oh I gotcha, yea no prob. your vouchers for each item, confirmation numbers, etc become available in your account after you're all paid up in full
there arent any added fees, I can promise you that! and our team will be there to help you as soon as you land, and at the resort
the only thing ive seen tho, only potential, is the incidental fee that hotels hold during your reservation. like the damage / liability fee that gets refunded at check out
most times I see that get waived during spring break season because of how busy it is
but thats the only thing I'd say is a potential
Is the booze cruise fully included and covered in the price we paid - $829- by the end of when the payments are due
I'll get the exact for you, it changes often and sometimes isnt put into effect. soon as I get it I'll send over. in the past I've seen it be about $30 per person. refunded at check out
and yup the booze cruise is in there, is it visible on your account as one of your included items?
Yes it is. I wanted to make sure it's fully included and not an additional cost
yea its all included. its a programmed event we host directly for our travelers that I included in there for you for free
heyy checkin in, you still have 2 open slots on two of the rooms. You guys still lookin to get those slots filled?
I think we will most likely just be doing those two in each of those rooms
okay cool. when will they 100% know by? cause we'll have to re adjust the reservation with the hotel
I would say in the next day I can text you
I would be happy to chat on a phone call if you are available tomorrow

Hi there, I've been talking with my group and I was wondering how possible it is to adjust our group's reservation to be from the 27th to the 1st instead of the 28th to the second. This is because we are having issues with the flight. Please let me know how this would effect our reservation and if it's possible and I will confirm with my entire group that this is something they want to do
Hey, will put an inquiry about this fist thing in the am
Thank you. We just want to get an idea about this so we can price compare flights.
All good. If its possible do you 100% want to switch?
Going to ask everyone now. I can let u know by tmrw
I'd like to call tomorrow if possible to discuss this.
No prob, text in the am and we'll sched a time through the day
Let me know when you are able to call
Hi, we won't be filling this extra spots
Still waiting on 2 more ppl to tell me they're okay with switching the dates to the 27-1st
Hi, we'd like to change our dates officially to March 27th- April 1st
Okay cool, let me put that in and then I'll confirm when done
Let me know when it's done so we can purchase plan tickets!
Also does this affect the contracts we have been signing for the payments in anyway
And have you found out about other schools that will be staying in the same hotel?
hey apologies yea its all updated to the 27th start date
same cost and all, same payment plan, etc. nothings changed other than the date
Hi there. I was wondering if you could tell me about where on the resort our rooms will be located?
heyy so that is up to the resort, depends on which rooms are ready when you go to check in tbh
hey hey does Julianna still plan on going on the trip? she's the last one behind on payments
hey whenever you have a min, if you could have Thea Diana and Julianna upload their flight info so we can schedule airport transfers
hey! just waiting on Thea and then we get get everything finalized
Ok sounds good she'll take care of that now
Are there any updates on performers who might be coming?
They still haven't released for your week yet, but its rumored that Levi, Not AGN, and itsMurph may be there
As you probably know a lot of peoples trips to Mexico r getting cancelled and I was wondering what the situation would be to add more people to our group? Has the pricing changed and is it too late?
It maaaayyyyyy be too late. I'll ask and see whats up tho
OK sounds great. If there's any other way to book a room in the same hotel whether it's by starting a new group or going through a different company that's also going there. Let me know.
Did you have any follow up info?
hey how many ppl are you looking to add?
Probably a room or 2 so between 3-6 ppl depending on the pricing
Word so you just need the price for now? In order to open it we'll need an exact amount to add I
hey hey. so I just got word that we actually no longer have availability for your dates. the hotel is all booked up on our end
Ok no worries. This means we are still okay for my current group correct?
Hi spiffy I just recieved ur email about add ons. Do we need to add on a specific date of the booze cruise included ??
Yo! Your booze cruise dates will be assigned when you get there and check in
Ok so no need to do any of the stuff u said in the email right
Who from my group got included in the booze cruise
hey hey. yea youre good. and everyone has the booze cruise!
Hi for some reason we aren't able to add any of the party passes to our account
Yo! Which events would you like to add
I think some of us want to do coco bongo
hey hey. was traveling through the end of the week apologies on the late response
do we know how many ppl wanna add coco? I'll get that added into your accounts
It's gonna be 9/10 of us that want to go coco bongo. Do you know which and what times the transportation take us there and then pick us back up?
hey hey, yea its an earlier event so pickup is usually 830
from the resort. and then typically back 1am the latest
Okay thanks. Let me know when we should go into the acct to pay
Is it going to be the Sunday?

big day tomorrow, I can get coco bongo added in this morning if y'all are ready to pay the balance off. as of now coco is scheduled for Sunday yup! when you get on site our staff will assist you with more details and if there are any other days available
Okay you can add it thank you
hey Karolina, thats been added in let me know if y'all see it in your accounts
Okay word. Just gotta pay your balances off so that you can see the vouchers you need for check in
You only added it to 9 people right?
Mackenzie Garcia Nacke is not going to coco bongo so I just want to make sure it's not on her account
Gotcha, we'll remove it from hers
Let me know when you do that so I can let her know to check it!
Are you able to remove coco bongo from Julianna Rosenberg too sorry?
Hey morning, do Rosemary, Thea, Julia, and Emma plan on doing Coco Bongo as well? Just need them to clear the balance if so
I believe on my end it says they paid
Let me know if this is not the case
Nahh a few others have but they are the remaining ones
Ok. I let them know they should be paying right now
Sounds good. just wanna make sure you all have everything you need for when you get there
I noticed it said to print all the vouchers but we don't have access to a printer since we are all at the airport already
Yea all good just screenshot them!

When you go to check in at the front desk you'll mainly just need your passports. The vouchers are for back up if needed. And then our party pass staff will text you later on today to set up a time to meet to give you the wristbands / tickets needed or any other directions
We are having trouble finding the pickup
Hey! Where in the airport are you now
Did you walk all the way out towards the exit
Alberto should be reaching out to yall soon about coco bongo
Rosemary is the last one that hasn't paid for hers yet. Is she going to that
She was planning to and said she was going to pay but now she's on the plane. I'm going to text her and hopefully she will see when she lands
Do you have any update on if rosemary and Mackenzie have been picked up from the airport?
hey hey. Ill check in with the ops team
has she not respnded to you?
No not yet. I think their flight was slightly delayed but I tracked it and it landed an hour ago
and Alberto, I'm actually not sure his last name sorry lol. did he text you
We are all very worried because we haven't heard from them
I believe this was their flight but I'm not positive
They didn't have service to check in with us.

Hi Spiffy. We were supposed to be picking up the tickets today for the booze cruise but the guy couldn't get through the gate so we had to walk all the way down to the gate to pick them up from him. I feel like it shouldn't have been the case
Hey, who did you meet with, Bernardo?
He was very nice but whoever organized for him to be able to come in didn't.
Yea Bernie. Great guy, I'm surprised he couldn't make it in he's the head of our booze cruise and transportation programming
Will shoot him a text and ask what happened, security must've given him a hard time
Who is supposed to reach out about coco bongo?
I just let them know, has he reached out?
